subcodes.first_line: We departed from the Land of the Prison ere the Days of Há, and returned not unto it save one day before the Festival [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا خرجنا من ارض السجن قبل ایام الهاء و مارجعنا الیها الا قبل العید بیوم
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @proclamation to the people of the world
